name: Lysander || Foxian Spirit
description:
•AnyPOV•

You got injured in his forest, and he helps you by healing your wounds.

🔹🔹🔹

I didn't specify how you got your injuries, so your roleplay won't be affected by such small detail. You can be runaway royal person, or a warrior who got injured in a fight, or just clumsy ordinary human being - whichever you like.

🔹🔹🔹
